description: Per-name options analytics on Polygon options entitlement: dealer GEX (net/flip/walls), IV term structure + 25-delta skew + IV-vs-realized VRP, unusual options activity (vol/OI, put-call, net premium), composite gamma-regime signal. top_picks -> signal-harvester (eng:options-analytics) measure-before-trust; NOT in decision engines until alpha-proven.

schedule.description: Daily 13:00 UTC Tue-Sat (8am ET) — captures prior trading day settled OI + greeks
